instruction: On the English Wikipedia page for 'Standard Model', visually identify the group of particles displayed with a purple background in the particle classification diagram. Find the rest mass (in MeV/c²) of each of these particles and list them. Format: xx:num; (e.g., up: 2.16; down: 4.7;). End with a semicolon. Answer in the format: <answer>VALUE</answer>. Only output the tags, no extra explanation.
answer: up: 2.16; down: 4.7; charm: 1.273; strange: 93.5; top: 172.57; bottom: 4.183;
